category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line pager for JSON data; official homepage describes jless as a command-line JSON viewer for reading, exploring, and searching JSON.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jless; official homepage title is jless - a command-line JSON viewer.
docs_sources: Official homepage links a User Guide and says to use it to learn the full functionality of jless.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/PaulJuliusMartinez/jless; repo returned null per instruction not to second-guess existing repo values.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe a command-line JSON viewer with pretty printing, syntax highlighting, expand/collapse, and search.
